character_concepts: Avi, a cheerful little avatar sprite made of a single glowing selfie photo and a small sound wave, expressive and friendly, able to read any script on cue.
Studio, a bulky grumpy old film-camera-and-lights rig character, heavy and demanding, the old way of getting on screen.
Waverly, an anthropomorphic voice-waveform ribbon with a cheeky smile, bouncy and musical.

clips.concept_title: On camera used to need a studio
clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Avi, a cheerful little avatar sprite made of a single glowing selfie photo and a small sound wave, stands small beside a bulky grumpy old camera-and-lights studio rig that demands a whole crew, a tired creator stuck behind it in the warm-lit background, wistful hopeful expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic depth. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow push-in from the giant studio rig down to little Avi -> the creator struggles with heavy gear while Avi waits patiently -> Voice (soft): getting on camera used to mean a studio and an edit. -> SFX: clunky gear thuds, a tired sigh.

clips.concept_title: One photo, a few seconds of voice
clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. A single selfie photo and a short glowing voice waveform swirl together and Avi springs fully to life mid-sentence reading a floating script, no studio anywhere, bright magical sparkle, delighted animated expression, warm energetic lighting, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic detail. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Quick spin as a selfie and a voice wave merge into Avi -> he pops to life and reads a floating script with a grin, no camera in sight -> Voice (bright, amazed): now one photo and a few seconds of voice is enough. -> SFX: a sparkly swoosh, a cheerful pop.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Avi the avatar sprite pauses as a sneaky masked look-alike of himself tries to slip in behind him, and Avi calmly pins on a bright consent and disclosure badge, a small hand-lettered sign nearby reads consent and disclosure matter, warm but serious lighting, thoughtful honest expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic lighting. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow orbit as a masked look-alike of Avi tries to sneak in -> Avi turns, pins on a consent badge and taps a small honest sign -> Voice (warm, honest): powerful, but a face from one selfie makes fakes easy, so consent matters. -> SFX: a soft warning tone, a reassuring badge click.

Pixar-style 3D animation. Avi the avatar sprite pinning on a consent and disclosure badge beside a small sign reading consent and disclosure matter, a faint masked look-alike behind him, warm serious bokeh, thoughtful expression, vibrant family-film color grade. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
